title: Piniritong Manok at Kamatis
description: A quick and simple Filipino-style dish using chicken wings and kamatis (tomatoes). The fried rat from bukid is omitted as it is not a typical ingredient in Filipino cooking and may not align with cultural or practical norms for home cooking.
instructions: Wash the chicken wings thoroughly and pat dry with a clean cloth.
Heat a pan over medium-high heat and add a small amount of oil if needed.
Add the chicken wings to the pan and cook for 5 minutes on each side until browned and cooked through.
While the chicken is cooking, wash and slice the kamatis into wedges.
Once the chicken wings are cooked, add the sliced kamatis to the pan and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 3-5 minutes until the tomatoes are softened and the flavors have melded together.
